detail.description: Elias Díaz doubles (7) on a line drive to left fielder Sam Antonacci.
Elias Díaz singles on a ground ball to shortstop Jeremy Peña.
Elias Díaz singles on a ground ball to left fielder Wade Meckler.
Elias Díaz singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Wade Meckler.
Elias Díaz doubles (6) on a fly ball to right fielder Kerry Carpenter.
Elias Díaz homers (4) on a fly ball to left center field.
Elias Díaz singles on a ground ball to third baseman Manny Machado. Jake Burger scores. Nicky Lopez to 2nd.
Elias Díaz doubles (4) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Byron Buxton. Alejandro Osuna scores.
Elias Díaz singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Austin Martin.
Elias Díaz singles on a line drive to right fielder Chase DeLauter.
Elias Díaz singles on a line drive to center fielder Kameron Misner.
Elias Díaz singles on a bunt ground ball to third baseman Nick Loftin. Ezequiel Duran scores. Jake Burger to 2nd.
Elias Díaz doubles (3) on a line drive to center fielder Tyler Tolbert. Ezequiel Duran scores.
Elias Díaz homers (2) on a fly ball to left center field. Starling Marte scores.

Angels challenged (tag play), call on the field was upheld: Angels challenged (fair or foul in outfield), call on the field was upheld: Elias Díaz doubles (2) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Bryce Teodosio. Carter Jensen scores. Isaac Collins scores.
Elias Díaz homers (3) on a fly ball to left center field.
Elias Díaz singles on a line drive to center fielder Kahlil Watson.
Elias Díaz hits a ground-rule double (1) on a fly ball down the left-field line.
Elias Díaz singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Trent Grisham.
Elias Díaz singles on a sharp ground ball to left fielder Jarren Duran.

Rangers challenged (home-plate collision), call on the field was upheld: Rangers challenged (tag play), call on the field was upheld: Elias Díaz singles on a ground ball to center fielder Jakob Marsee. Alejandro Osuna out at home on the throw, center fielder Jakob Marsee to second baseman Xavier Edwards to catcher Joe Mack.
Elias Díaz doubles (5) on a fly ball to right fielder Nathan Lukes. Ezequiel Duran scores. Alejandro Osuna scores.
Elias Díaz homers (1) on a fly ball to right field.
Elias Díaz singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Mauricio Dubón.
